description: Asset license manifest for Seasonal Profile Themes. One record per shipped illustration or font asset, used by scripts/verify-theme-assets.js to gate the build (Apple Developer Program License Agreement 3.3.4). PLACEHOLDER PHASE: no illustration/font assets are bundled yet, so records is empty. Adding any real asset without a matching record fails the build.

recordSchema.assetPath: string - repo-relative path to the bundled asset file
recordSchema.source: string - where the asset came from (URL or origin)
